source: Curated finite nucleotide-window manifest for BioReality ORF start/stop enumeration; records are external annotation inputs to the experiment, not BEDC-derived facts.
cannot_claim: These rows do not assert ribosome-mediated translation.
These rows do not assert folded structure, physical admissibility, biological function, or universal mechanism.
These rows do not promote codon/window geometry to a global biological law.
These rows do not classify any window outside this manifest.
These rows keep curated biological annotation separate from internal newmath/BEDC coordinate derivation.

windows.provenance: RefSeq NM_000518.5 Homo sapiens HBB transcript CDS interval as curated nucleotide-window input for finite start/stop enumeration only
